title: The Hidden Story Behind Lee Harvey Oswald & JFK
summary: This interview discusses the hidden story behind Lee Harvey Oswald and the JFK assassination, exploring theories about Oswald's role and motivations. The discussion suggests Oswald may have knowingly participated in a plot but was deceived about its true nature and outcome.

key_claims.claim: Oswald was not an innocent bystander but was knowingly involved in a plan
Oswald believed he was supposed to take a shot at Kennedy but not kill him
The plan was to connect Oswald to Cuba through the Fair Play for Cuba Committee to blame Cuba for the assassination attempt
Oswald's time in Russia was meant to be used as part of a narrative connecting him to communist ties
Oswald believed he would be arrested and receive legal defense after the event
